---
ID: US-OLV-114
Title: Constrain modal and popover layout
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-18
Milestone: Normalize design tokens and responsive behavior

As a operator
I want modals and dropdowns that fit the viewport
So that forms remain usable on small screens

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Modal content is constrained within the viewport.
- [ ] Popover/dropdown overlays avoid clipping where global positioning is used.
- [ ] Escape/outside click closes supported overlays.
- [ ] CSS uses shared positioning/z-index tokens.

Notes: Later portal dropdown work further refined account pickers.
---
